title: Amtech L0650 7 Piece VDE Electrical Screwdriver Set, Tested Up to 1000V, Insulated, Ergonomic
features: CERTIFIED: This electrical screwdriver set is tested to 1000V and is VDE certified to BS EN 60900:20018
INSULATED: Each one has an insulated sheath to protect the user from live current
DURABLE: They have tough, chrome vanadium shafts with corrosion-resistant tips
ERGONOMIC: Ergonomically designed, the screwdrivers have easily identifiable dual-colour handles

SET INCLUDES: The set includes four slotted screwdrivers (1.2mm x 6.5mm x 150mm, 1mm x 5.5mm x 125mm, 0.8mm x 4.0mm x 100mm, 0.5mm x 3mm x 75mm) and three Phillips screwdrivers: (PH 0 x 75mm, PH 1 x 80mm, PH 2 x 100mm)
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Yes
